chunks.title: Job's Complaint to His Friends
chunks.reason: A continuous speech where Job addresses his friends, questioning their torment and pleading for pity.

chunks.title: Job's Declaration of Faith
chunks.reason: A distinct section where Job expresses his hope for a living Redeemer and future vision of God.

chunks.title: Job's Warning to His Friends
chunks.reason: A concluding warning urging his friends to fear the sword and recognize divine judgment.
